grant_title: Delaware Small Business Grants (EDGE Grants and Antares REACH Grant Program)
project_area: Small business growth, STEM innovation, underrepresented community support, life sciences, biotech, research and development, women entrepreneurs, community-based competitions
demographic_requirements: Majority ownership by historically underrepresented groups (e.g., women, people of color, military-affiliated, disabled, LGBTQ+), for-profit entities, growth potential, solid business plan, financial criteria, scalable business model
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants include small businesses in Delaware, with specific programs targeting STEM companies (up to $100,000), non-STEM businesses (up to $50,000), and underrepresented entrepreneurs (e.g., Antares REACH Grant for $20,000 plus mentorship). Matching funds are required for EDGE Grants. Priority is given to businesses in essential sectors like housing and health services.
